description_long: This is a large, plush recliner upholstered in dark brown leather, featuring a generously padded seat, backrest, and armrests. The seat cushion is thick and slightly indented, suggesting softness and comfort, while the backrest is overstuffed and extends above the armrests for ample support. The armrests are wide, rounded, and heavily cushioned, matching the overall robust and inviting appearance. The recliner sits on short, sturdy legs, which are only partially visible beneath the upholstery. The leather surface has a subtle sheen, with natural creases and folds that add to its realistic texture. No visible reclining mechanism or footrest is apparent from any angle.
description: A large, dark brown leather recliner with thick, padded cushions and wide, rounded armrests. The surface is subtly glossy with natural creases, exuding comfort and durability.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep, padded seat, overstuffed backrest, and wide, rounded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the recliner's thick seat and backrest, as well as the armrest's substantial padding.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous leather back with minimal visible seams and short legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the plushness of the seat and armrest contours.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are wide, rounded, and heavily padded, covered in the same dark brown leather as the rest of the recliner, with smooth contours and no visible seams or hardware.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is a single, continuous, overstuffed piece that extends above the armrests, providing full back support without visible segmentation.
